zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande d'ARAGON於1384年8月19日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩札拉格薩時，她的父親Rey Juan I de Aragón33歲，母親Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon19歲。她於1400年12月2日與Louis II d'ANJOU在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年11月14日在法國安喬索馬爾享年58歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolande d'ARAGON于1384年8月19日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩札拉格薩时，她的父亲Rey Juan I de Aragón33岁，母亲Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon19岁。她于1400年12月2日与Louis II d'ANJOU在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年11月14日在法国安喬索馬爾享年58岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: d'ARAGON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Pierre, Raoul, Rejean.

French: variant of Daragon, habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, denoting someone from Aragon, a region and medieval kingdom in Spain (see Aragon ), or a habitational name for someone from Aragon, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Deragon is very rare in France. Compare Dragon .

variants.name: Aragon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Ruben, Fernando, Jesus, Julio, Luis, Raul, Mario, Alfonso.

Spanish (Aragón) and southern French: habitational name from Aragon, Spain, which was an independent kingdom from 1035 to 1479. It took its name from the river Aragón, which arises in its northwestern corner. The river name may be related to Basque (h)ara(n) ‘valley’; in Basque, Aragon is called Aragoa or Aragoi, which probably means ‘high valley’. Compare Deragon .

variants.name: Dragon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Adelard, Alphonse, Andre, Antoine, Jean Robert, Marcel, Michel.

French and English: nickname perhaps for a fierce or fiery person or occupational name for someone who carried a standard in battle or else in a pageant or procession, from Old French (Middle English) drago(u)n ‘snake, serpent, water monster’ (from Latin draco, genitive draconis, from Greek drakōn, ultimately from derkesthai ‘to flash’). This word was applied in Late Latin to military standards in the form of windsocks, so resembling snakes.

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande d'ARAGON was born on 19 August 1384, in Zaragoza, Zaragoza, Aragón, Spain, her father, Rey Juan I de Aragón, was 33 and her mother, Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon, was 19. She married Louis II d'ANJOU on 2 December 1400, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 14 November 1442, in Saumur, Anjou, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande d'ARAGON est née le 19 août 1384, à Zaragoza, Zaragoza, Aragón, Espagne, son père, Rey Juan I de Aragón, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Louis II d'ANJOU le 2 décembre 1400, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 novembre 1442, à Saumur, Anjou, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande d'ARAGON am 19. August 1384 in Zaragoza, Zaragoza, Aragón, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rey Juan I de Aragón 33 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon 19. Sie hat am 2. Dezember 1400 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich Louis II d'ANJOU geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. November 1442 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Saumur, Anjou, Frankreich und wurde in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande d'ARAGON è nata il il 19 agosto 1384 nel Zaragoza, Zaragoza, Aragón, Spagna, sua padre, Rey Juan I de Aragón, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Louis II d'ANJOU il 2 dicembre 1400, nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 novembre 1442, nel Saumur, Anjou, Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Yolande d'ARAGONが1384年8月19日にスペインアラグoンザラゴザザラゴザで生まれた時，父Rey Juan I de Aragónは33歳，母Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragonは19歳であった。1400年12月2日にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールでLouis II d'ANJOUと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年11月14日にフランスアンジョウサウムルで58歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Yolande d'ARAGON(이)가 1384년 8월 19일 스페인 아라그o 자라고자 자라고자에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rey Juan I de Aragón(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1400년 12월 2일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 Louis II d'ANJOU(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 11월 14일 프랑스 앤조우 소머에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande d'ARAGON nasceu em 19 de agosto de 1384, em Zaragoza, Zaragoza, Aragón, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Juan I de Aragón, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis II d'ANJOU em 2 de dezembro de 1400, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1442, em Saumur, Anjou, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande d'ARAGON родилась 19 августа 1384 г. в местности зарагоза, зарагоза, арагoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Rey Juan I de Aragón было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis II d'ANJOU 2 декабря 1400 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 14 ноября 1442 г. в местности саумур, анджоу, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolande d'ARAGON nació el 19 de agosto de 1384, en Zaragoza, Zaragoza, Aragón, España, su papá, Rey Juan I de Aragón, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Louis II d'ANJOU el 2 de diciembre de 1400, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1442, en Saumur, Anjou, Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
